title: Resolving the ionizing photon budget crisis with JWST/NIRCam HII clumping constraints at z=6
summary: We present a comprehensive study of the ionizing properties of 1721 galaxies at $5.6<z<6.5$ using deep JWST/NIRCam photometric imaging from the NEP, JADES, and PRIMER surveys spanning an unmasked area $\sim550$arcmin$^2$ across UV magnitudes $-22\lesssim M_{\rm UV}\lesssim-17.5$. Our $90\%$ stellar mass complete sample suggests little relation of UV slope with magnitude, $β_{\rm UV}=(-0.040\pm0.022)M_{\rm UV}-2.88^{+0.43}_{-0.44}$, implying $f_{\rm esc}^{\rm LyC}\simeq5\%$ based on calibrations from the Low-redshift Lyman Continuum Survey (LzLCS). We measure a constant ionizing photon production efficiency with UV magnitude, $\log_{10}(ξ_{\rm ion, 0}/\rm Hz\,erg^{-1}) = -0.006^{+0.019}_{-0.017}~M_{\rm UV} + 25.05^{+0.39}_{-0.34}$, consistent with HST canonical values. The total production rate of photons escaping into the IGM is computed as $\log_{10}(\dot{n}_{\rm ion}/\rm s^{-1}Mpc^{-3})=50.31^{+0.07}_{-0.06}$ for $M_{\rm UV}<-17$ galaxies from our star forming and smouldering UV luminosity functions (UVLFs), which differ in the faint-end slope ($α_{\rm SFG}=-2.2\pm0.2$; $α_{\rm sm}=-1.7\pm0.2$). Extrapolating to the latest UVLF turnover limits from the massive lensing galaxy cluster Abell S1063 ($M_{\rm UV, lim}=-13.5$) implies that a recombination-weighted HII clumping factor $C_{\rm HII, rec}=6.2^{+4.1}_{-2.1}$ is required to produce fully stably reionized at $z\simeq6$. A clumping factor of this magnitude resolves the ionizing photon budget crisis. Our methodology paves the way for indirect clumping measurements from galaxies which will provide insight into earlier stages of the EoR when the Ly$α$-forest becomes saturated and more direct quasar measurements become impossible.

title: UV Luminosity Functions from HST and JWST: A Possible Resolution to the High-Redshift Galaxy Abundance Puzzle and Implications for Cosmic Strings
summary: Recent observations of high redshift galaxies by the James Webb Space Telescope suggest the presence of a bright population of galaxies that is more abundant than predicted by most galaxy formation models. These observations have led to a rethinking of these models, and numerous astrophysical and cosmological solutions have been proposed, including cosmic strings, topological defects that may be remnants of a specific phase transition in the very early moments of the Universe. In this paper, we integrate cosmic strings, a source of nonlinear and non-Gaussian perturbations, into the semi analytical code Zeus21, allowing us to efficiently predict the ultraviolet luminosity function (UVLF). We conduct a precise study of parameter degeneracies between star-formation astrophysics and cosmic-string phenomenology. Our results suggest that cosmic strings can boost the early-galaxy abundance enough to explain the measured UVLFs from the James Webb and Hubble Space Telescopes from redshift z = 4 to z = 17 without modifying the star-formation physics. In addition, we set a new upper bound on the string tension of $Gμ\lessapprox 10^{-8}$ ($95\%$ credibility), improving upon previous limits from the cosmic microwave background. Although with current data there is some level of model and prior dependence to this limit, it suggests that UVLFs are a promising avenue for future observational constraints on cosmic-string physics.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜对高红移星系的最新观测表明，存在一个明亮的星系群体，其丰度超过了大多数星系形成模型的预测。这些观测促使人们重新思考这些模型，并提出了许多天体物理和宇宙学解决方案，包括宇宙弦——一种可能是宇宙极早期特定相变残留的拓扑缺陷。本文将宇宙弦（一种非线性和非高斯扰动源）整合到半解析代码Zeus21中，从而能够有效预测紫外光度函数。我们精确研究了恒星形成天体物理学与宇宙弦现象学之间的参数简并。我们的结果表明，宇宙弦能够将早期星系丰度提高到足以解释詹姆斯·韦伯和哈勃空间望远镜在红移z=4至z=17范围内测量的紫外光度函数，而无需修改恒星形成物理学。此外，我们设定了弦张力的新上限$G\mu\lessapprox 10^{-8}$（95%置信度），优于此前来自宇宙微波背景的限制。尽管当前数据下该上限存在一定程度的模型和先验依赖性，但它表明紫外光度函数是未来对宇宙弦物理学进行观测约束的一个有前景的途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：宇宙弦可以解释JWST观测到的高红移星系丰度异常，紫外光度函数是未来约束宇宙弦物理的有前景的观测途径，尽管当前结果存在一定的模型和先验依赖性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Comparison between predictions of UVLFs with (dashed line) and without (solid line) the presence of cosmic strings with a string tension corresponding to the 95 % 95\% credibility limits (CL) from Planck 2014. HST observations from Ref. [ Bouwens_2021 ] are shown in comparison in black with their error bar corresponding to a 68 % 68\% confidence interval. In both cases, the astrophysical parameters are standard for galaxy formation models and are the same in both predictions; only the presence of strings changes. These results highlight the very high sensitivity of UVLFs to the presence of cosmic strings for string tensions close to the limits obtained by Planck data. This sensitivity is greater at higher redshifts.

title: A remarkable Gaia-assisted discovery of a temporally varying, triple-lensed quasar at z=2.67
comment: 9 pages including references. 9 figures. A&A submitted
summary: Gravitationally lensed quasars are viable cosmic tools for constraining a diversity of fundamental astrophysical phenomena; They enable identification of faint, low-mass supermassive black holes, provide unique constraints on the intervening intergalactic or interstellar medium in their sightlines, and can be used to determine key cosmological quantities such as the Hubble constant, $H_0$. However, they are rare phenomena, and it has proven difficult to define efficient, unbiased selection methods.} In this study, we report the spectroscopic identification of a remarkable triple-lensed quasar system at $z=2.67$, identified based on its astrometric measurements from the {\em Gaia} mission, as well as a larger spectroscopic follow-up survey of {\em Gaia}-detected candidate lensed quasars. We characterize in detail the three mirror images of the quasar and their spatial and temporal spectroscopic coverage, with focus on the emission-line properties which shows variation across sigthlines and temporal evolution over the $\sim 11$months spectroscopic campaign. We construct a lens model of the foreground source from a combination of the multiple spectra and deep optical imaging, providing a robust halo mass of $M_{\rm h} = (2.78 \pm 0.05)\times 10^{10}M_\odot$. Based on the lens model, the time delay between each sightline is translated into an intrinsic quasar time, allowing us to construct a quasar timeseries over $\sim18$months with monthly cadence. Over months timescales the broad emission lines vary in both velocity offset and equivalent width (EW) as well as an overall increase in ionization. This exemplary triple-lensed quasars demonstrates the viability of identifying such rare lens configurations based purely on the astrometric measurements from the {\em Gaia} mission, which we here provide optimized selection criteria for, for future studies.

AI.tldr: 利用Gaia天体测量数据发现了一个罕见的红移z=2.67的三重引力透镜类星体系统，通过光谱观测和透镜建模获得了前景星系的质量，并利用时间延迟构建了类星体时间序列，展示了基于Gaia数据识别此类稀有系统的可行性。
AI.motivation: 引力透镜类星体是研究多种基础天体物理现象的重要工具，但这类系统非常罕见，且缺乏高效、无偏的选择方法。本研究旨在探索基于Gaia天体测量数据识别引力透镜类星体的可行性。
AI.method: 基于Gaia任务的天体测量数据识别候选引力透镜类星体，进行大规模光谱后续观测。对发现的三重透镜类星体进行详细光谱表征，构建透镜模型，利用时间延迟构建类星体时间序列。
AI.result: 成功发现了一个红移z=2.67的罕见三重引力透镜类星体系统，测得前景星系晕质量为(2.78±0.05)×10^10 M⊙。通过时间延迟构建了约18个月、月采样率的时间序列，发现宽发射线在速度偏移、等效宽度和电离度方面存在变化。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了仅基于Gaia天体测量数据识别稀有引力透镜类星体配置的可行性，并为未来研究提供了优化的选择标准。这个三重透镜类星体系统为研究类星体物理和宇宙学参数提供了独特的机会。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 引力透镜类星体是约束多种基本天体物理现象的有效宇宙工具：它们能够识别微弱的低质量超大质量黑洞，提供对其视线方向上星系际或星际介质的独特约束，并可用于确定哈勃常数$H_0$等关键宇宙学参数。然而，这类现象十分罕见，且难以定义高效、无偏的选择方法。本研究基于盖亚（Gaia）任务的天体测量数据以及一项更大规模的盖亚探测候选透镜类星体光谱后续巡天，报告了一个红移$z=2.67$的显著三重透镜类星体系统的光谱识别。我们详细描述了该类星体的三个镜像及其空间和时间光谱覆盖，重点关注发射线特性，这些特性在不同视线方向上表现出变化，并在约11个月的光谱监测期间呈现时间演化。我们结合多光谱和深光学成像构建了前景源的透镜模型，得到了稳健的暗晕质量$M_{\rm h} = (2.78 \pm 0.05)\times 10^{10}M_\odot$。基于该透镜模型，每条视线之间的时间延迟被转换为固有的类星体时间，从而构建了约18个月、每月一次采样的类星体时间序列。在数月时间尺度上，宽发射线的速度偏移、等效宽度以及电离程度均表现出整体增加。这一典型的三重透镜类星体证明了仅基于盖亚任务的天体测量数据识别此类稀有透镜配置的可行性，我们在此为未来研究提供了优化的选择标准。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：该研究证明了仅基于盖亚天体测量数据识别稀有引力透镜类星体配置的可行性，并为未来研究提供了优化的选择标准。这个三重透镜类星体系统为研究类星体物理和宇宙学参数提供了独特的机会。

title: Improved Identification of Strongly Lensed Gravitational Waves with Host Galaxy Locations
summary: We present a Bayesian framework that enhances the identification of strongly lensed gravitational waves (GWs) by incorporating informative positional priors from the Euclid galaxy lens catalog. The core of our method introduces a two-step reweighting scheme: first, gravitational wave parameter estimation is performed under a uniform sky prior; the resulting posterior is then used to reweight galaxy positions within the Euclid catalog, constructing an astrophysically informed positional prior. Comparing this Euclid-informed prior against a uniform prior within our framework reveals distinct behaviors. While the posterior estimates of the intrinsic waveform parameters show little sensitivity to the prior change, the Bayes factor for lensing identification exhibits significant prior dependence. Crucially, for truly lensed event pairs, the Bayes factor systematically increases, whereas for unlensed pairs it decreases. This dual effect is vital for robust discrimination. Our analysis demonstrates that this multi-messenger approach significantly improves the confidence of lensing searches. For lensed pairs, the method boosts the Bayes factor by an average factor of $\sim 10$, while effectively suppressing false positives for unlensed coincidences. This underscores the critical importance of prior specification and showcases the substantial gains achievable by synergizing gravitational-wave data with electromagnetic survey information.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出一个贝叶斯框架，通过整合欧几里得星系透镜目录中的信息性位置先验，增强了对强透镜引力波的识别。该方法的核心引入了一个两步重加权方案：首先在均匀天区先验下进行引力波参数估计；然后利用所得后验对欧几里得目录中的星系位置进行重加权，构建一个天体物理信息化的位置先验。在我们的框架中比较欧几里得信息先验与均匀先验，揭示了不同的行为。虽然内在波形参数的后验估计对先验变化不敏感，但透镜识别的贝叶斯因子表现出显著的先验依赖性。关键的是，对于真正的透镜事件对，贝叶斯因子系统性增加，而对于非透镜事件对则减少。这种双重效应对于鲁棒判别至关重要。我们的分析表明，这种多信使方法显著提高了透镜搜索的置信度。对于透镜对，该方法将贝叶斯因子平均提高了约10倍，同时有效抑制了非透镜巧合的误报。这强调了先验指定的关键重要性，并展示了通过协同引力波数据与电磁巡天信息所能实现的显著增益。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：多信使方法显著提高了透镜搜索的置信度，展示了结合引力波数据和电磁波调查信息的重要价值。

The initial uniform weights w i ( 0 ) = 1 / N w_{i}^{(0)}=1/N have been updated to w i w_{i} based on the consistency between galaxy positions ( α i , δ i ) (\alpha_{i},\delta_{i}) and the GW sky localization, implementing the mixture model P Euclid ​ ( α , δ | 𝒢 ) = ∑ i = 1 N w i ​ K ​ ( Δ ​ α i , Δ ​ δ i ) P_{Euclid}(\alpha,\delta\,|\,\mathcal{G})=\sum_{i=1}^{N}w_{i}\,K(\Delta\alpha_{i},\Delta\delta_{i}) . The colorbar indicates the relative probability mass assigned to each galaxy, reflecting the combined evidence from both Euclid catalog and GW parameter estimation.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Combined corner plot comparing posterior distributions for lensed gravitational wave signal parameters under different prior assumptions. The royal blue contours show ET lensed GW signal 1 with uniform priors, dark orange contours show ET lensed GW signal 2 with uniform priors, crimson contours show ET lensed GW signal 1 with Euclid priors, and light green contours show ET lensed GW signal 2 with Euclid priors. All contours represent the 68% and 95% credible regions. The injection values are marked by colored lines corresponding to each analysis (gray for uniform prior analyses, crimson and light green for Euclid prior analyses), illustrating the impact of prior information on parameter estimation accuracy. The near-perfect overlap of contours confirms that intrinsic parameter estimates are robust to prior choice for high-SNR ET signals.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：比较不同先验假设下透镜引力波信号参数后验分布的联合角图。皇家蓝轮廓显示均匀先验下的爱因斯坦望远镜透镜引力波信号1，深橙色轮廓显示均匀先验下的爱因斯坦望远镜透镜引力波信号2，深红色轮廓显示欧几里得先验下的爱因斯坦望远镜透镜引力波信号1，浅绿色轮廓显示欧几里得先验下的爱因斯坦望远镜透镜引力波信号2。所有轮廓代表68%和95%置信区域。注入值用对应分析的颜色线条标记（灰色用于均匀先验分析，深红色和浅绿色用于欧几里得先验分析），说明了先验信息对参数估计精度的影响。轮廓近乎完美的重叠证实了对于高信噪比爱因斯坦望远镜信号，内在参数估计对先验选择具有鲁棒性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of the restricted Bayes factors log 10 ⁡ ℬ ( 5 ) \log_{10}\mathcal{B}^{(5)} computed under uniform and Euclid-informed priors. The Bayes factors are computed using only the five common parameters ( ℳ c \mathcal{M}_{c} , q q , θ JN \theta_{JN} , a 1 a_{1} , a 2 a_{2} ) to isolate the effect of incorporating positional information. Blue points represent unlensed event pairs, while red points represent lensed event pairs. The dashed diagonal line indicates equality between the two priors. The systematic shift of lensed pairs above the diagonal demonstrates the enhanced sensitivity provided by the Euclid-informed prior, while the shift of unlensed pairs below the diagonal shows suppression of false positives.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在均匀先验和欧几里得信息先验下计算的受限贝叶斯因子log₁₀ℬ^(5)的比较。贝叶斯因子仅使用五个共同参数（ℳ_c, q, θ_JN, a₁, a₂）计算，以隔离位置信息的影响。蓝点表示非透镜事件对，红点表示透镜事件对。虚线对角线表示两种先验下的相等性。透镜对在对角线上方的系统性偏移表明欧几里得信息先验提供的增强灵敏度，而非透镜对在对角线下方的偏移则显示了对误报的抑制。

title: Signatures of star formation inside galactic outflows
summary: Observations have suggested that galactic outflows contain substantial amounts of dense and clumpy molecular gas, creating favourable conditions for igniting star formation. Indeed, theoretical models and hydrodynamical simulations have suggested that stars could form within galactic outflows, representing a new mode of star-formation that differs significantly from the typical star formation in star forming discs. In this paper, we examine 12 local galaxies with powerful Active Galactic Nuclei and high star-formation rate using spectroscopic data from the X-shooter spectrograph at the Very Large Telescope. We investigate the excitation mechanism and physical properties of these outflows via spatially resolved diagnostic diagrams (along with tests to rule out contribution by shocks and external photoionisation). Out of the seven galaxies with clearly detected outflows, we find robust evidence for star formation within the outflow of one galaxy (IRAS 20551-4250), with two additional galaxies showing tentative signs (IRAS 13120-5453 and F13229-2934). Therefore, our findings support previous results that star formation inside outflows can be a relatively common phenomenon among these active galaxies and may have played an important role in the formation and evolution of the spheroidal component of galaxies.

AI.tldr: 研究发现星系外流中可能存在恒星形成，通过观测12个活跃星系核星系，在其中一个星系中发现了外流内恒星形成的可靠证据，另外两个星系也有迹象表明可能存在这种现象。
AI.motivation: 观测显示星系外流中含有大量致密、团块状的分子气体，这为恒星形成创造了有利条件。理论和模拟表明恒星可能在星系外流中形成，这代表了一种不同于典型星系盘中恒星形成的新模式。
AI.method: 使用甚大望远镜上的X-shooter摄谱仪对12个具有强大活跃星系核和高恒星形成率的本地星系进行光谱观测。通过空间分辨的诊断图分析外流的激发机制和物理性质，并排除激波和外部光电离的贡献。
AI.result: 在7个明确探测到外流的星系中，发现一个星系（IRAS 20551-4250）的外流中存在恒星形成的可靠证据，另外两个星系（IRAS 13120-5453和F13229-2934）显示出初步迹象。这表明外流内恒星形成在这些活跃星系中可能是相对常见的现象。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持先前发现，即外流内恒星形成在活跃星系中可能是相对普遍的现象，这可能对星系球状成分的形成和演化起到重要作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 观测表明，星系外流中含有大量致密且呈团块状的分子气体，这为引发恒星形成创造了有利条件。事实上，理论模型和流体动力学模拟已提出，恒星可能在星系外流内部形成，这代表了一种与典型盘状恒星形成截然不同的新模式。本文利用甚大望远镜X-shooter摄谱仪的光谱数据，研究了12个具有活跃活动星系核和高恒星形成率的本地星系。我们通过空间分辨的诊断图（并辅以排除激波和外部光电离贡献的检验）探究了这些外流的激发机制和物理性质。在7个清晰探测到外流的星系中，我们找到了一个星系（IRAS 20551-4250）外流内存在恒星形成的可靠证据，另有2个星系（IRAS 13120-5453和F13229-2934）显示出初步迹象。因此，我们的结果支持先前的研究发现，即外流内恒星形成在这些活跃星系中可能是一种相对普遍的现象，并可能在星系球状成分的形成和演化中发挥了重要作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：研究结果支持先前发现，即外流内恒星形成在活跃星系中可能是相对普遍的现象，这可能对星系球状成分的形成和演化起到重要作用。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Properties of 12 galaxies observed by the X-shooter in the ESO programme 0103.B-0478(A) and 097.B-0918(A). Columns show: redshift, physical scale in kpc per arcsecond, logarithm of the infrared luminosity ( L IR = L ( 8 − 1000 μ L_{IR}=L(8-1000\,\mu m) in units of solar luminosity), average seeing during observations, and right ascension and declination (J2000). Coordinates, scales, and infrared luminosities for F13229-2934/NGC5135, NGC 7130, and IC 4518B are from arribas2008 . Coordinates for IRAS 20551-4250 and infrared luminosities for IRAS 20551-4250 and IRAS 13120-5453 are from SIMBAD and NED. Infrared luminosities for F22491-1808, F00509+1225, and F17207-0014 are from 2003AJ....126.1607S . Infrared luminosities for LEDA 166649, F21130-4446, and F23389+0300 are from NED. Infrared luminosity for NVSSJ151402+015737 (also known as IRAS F15116+0209) is estimated from WISE W4 band photometry. Physical scales are calculated from redshifts using Planck 2018 cosmology for galaxies not in arribas2008 . Coordinates for remaining galaxies are extracted from X-shooter FITS file headers. We could not thoroughly perform analysis and reach a conclusion on the last 5 galaxies in the table because of: (i) poor SNR due to limitations imposed by visibility or exposure time during observation (galaxy F17207-0014, IC 4518B and F23389+0300), (ii) outflow is not detected (galaxy F21130-4446) and (iii) stellar continuum cannot be fitted and caused difficulties in disentangling the galactic outflow components from the stellar continuum (stellar continuum of galaxy F00509+1225 is dominated by the broad-line region). Outflow disentanglement is discussed in Section 2.2 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：ESO项目0103.B-0478(A)和097.B-0918(A)中X-shooter观测的12个星系的属性。列显示：红移、每角秒的物理尺度（kpc）、红外光度对数（L_IR = L(8–1000 μm)，以太阳光度为单位）、观测期间的平均视宁度，以及赤经和赤纬（J2000）。F13229-2934/NGC5135、NGC 7130和IC 4518B的坐标、尺度和红外光度来自arribas2008。IRAS 20551-4250的坐标以及IRAS 20551-4250和IRAS 13120-5453的红外光度来自SIMBAD和NED。F22491-1808、F00509+1225和F17207-0014的红外光度来自2003AJ....126.1607S。LEDA 166649、F21130-4446和F23389+0300的红外光度来自NED。NVSSJ151402+015737（也称为IRAS F15116+0209）的红外光度根据WISE W4波段测光估算。对于不在arribas2008中的星系，物理尺度使用Planck 2018宇宙学从红移计算得出。其余星系的坐标从X-shooter FITS文件头中提取。由于以下原因，我们未能对表中最后5个星系进行彻底分析并得出结论：(i) 观测期间受能见度或曝光时间限制导致信噪比低（星系F17207-0014、IC 4518B和F23389+0300），(ii) 未探测到外流（星系F21130-4446），(iii) 恒星连续谱无法拟合，导致难以从恒星连续谱中分离星系外流成分（星系F00509+1225的恒星连续谱由宽线区主导）。外流分离在第2.2节讨论。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Subsections of continuum-subtracted X-shooter spectra (black) of the galaxy IRAS 20551-4250, extracted from the central region around the relevant emission lines for BPT-diagnostics, displaying the decomposition by 4 Gaussian components (see legend) representing the narrow components associated with the gas in the galactic disk and the broad components tracing the outflows. For clarity of presentation, the best-fit stellar continuum is subtracted in this figure. However, the full spectral fit with ppxf was performed on the stellar continuum and emission lines simultaneously.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：星系IRAS 20551-4250的连续谱扣除后X-shooter光谱（黑色）子部分，提取自BPT诊断相关发射线周围中心区域，显示由4个高斯分量（见图例）分解的结果，分别代表与星系盘气体相关的窄分量和示踪外流的宽分量。为清晰展示，本图中减去了最佳拟合的恒星连续谱。然而，使用ppxf对恒星连续谱和发射线同时进行了完整光谱拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : A typical case (4 out of 7 galaxies analysed) where outflows are in the AGN excitation region. The flux ratios of the individual components extracted at different apertures for galaxy NVSSJ151402+015737 are plotted on the [NII] (left), [SII] (middle) and [OI] (right) diagnostic diagrams. The velocity of each component is colour-coded, from red (more redshifted) to blue (more blueshifted). The symbols are proportional to the FWHM of the component, as indicated by the legend above. The black line contours indicate the distribution of galaxies and AGN (10, 30, 68, 85 and 95 percent) from the SDSS.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：外流位于AGN激发区域的典型情况（7个分析星系中的4个）。星系NVSSJ151402+015737在不同孔径下提取的单个分量的通量比绘制在[NII]（左）、[SII]（中）和[OI]（右）诊断图上。每个分量的速度用颜色编码，从红色（更红移）到蓝色（更蓝移）。符号大小与分量的FWHM成正比，如图例上方所示。黑色线轮廓表示SDSS中星系和AGN的分布（10%、30%、68%、85%和95%）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Same as Fig. 3 , for the galaxy IRAS 20551-4250, in which case most of the outflowing components are located in the star forming region of the diagram, especially in the [SII]-BPT and [OI]-BPT, which are less affected by metallicity and nitrogen enrichment dependence.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3相同，但针对星系IRAS 20551-4250，其中大多数外流分量位于图的恒星形成区，尤其是在[SII]-BPT和[OI]-BPT中，这些区域受金属丰度和氮富集影响较小。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : The broad components (blue hatched) tend to have lower [SII] flux ratio, hence higher density than the narrow components (orange). The histogram shows 7 galaxies analysed.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：宽分量（蓝色阴影）倾向于具有较低的[SII]通量比，因此密度高于窄分量（橙色）。直方图显示7个分析星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Ionisation parameter inferred from the F ​ ( [ OIII ] ​ λ ​ λ ​ 4959 , 5007 ​ Å ) F({[OIII]}\lambda\lambda 4959,5007\textup{\AA }) / F ​ ( [ OII ] ​ λ ​ λ ​ 3726 , 3729 ​ Å ) F({[OII]}\lambda\lambda 3726,3729\textup{\AA }) line ratio as a function of the R 23 R_{{23}} parameter. Circles represent kinematic components in the galaxies where outflows occupy the SF region of the BPT and VO diagrams, namely IRAS 20551-4250 (robust evidence; see Figures ˜ 1 , 2 and 4 ), IRAS 13120-5453 (tentative evidence; see Figures ˜ 10 , 11 and 12 ) and F13229-2934 (tentative evidence; see Figures ˜ 13 , 14 and 15 ). Outflows (large blue circles) share similar locations with normal star-forming regions (small red circles). This result argues strongly in favour of in situ stellar photoionisation by young stars formed inside the outflows, because in the alternative case where outflows are photoionised by external star formation the blue markers should lie much lower than the red markers. The black line contours indicate the distribution of galaxy population (30, 80 and 95 percent) from the SDSS. Most components lie within the 95 percent population contours. For those who do not, they are situated on the left hand side of the cluster, i.e. have lower log( R 23 R_{23} ) values and hence, higher metallicity. These components also have a higher range of uncertainties.

title: Transient protostellar cores in high mass star forming regions revealed by time-resolved synthetic imaging of dust emission
comment: Accepted by MNRAS. 16 pages plus appendices with 14 figures
summary: The connection between dense gas cores and their infant protostars is key to understanding how stars form in molecular clouds. In this paper we investigate the properties, persistence, and protostellar content of cores that would be identified by a dendrogram analysis of 1.3 mm ALMA images. We use a time series of synthetic images produced by post-processing a simulation of star formation in a massive globally collapsing clump, with polaris to calculate dust radiative transfer and CASA to generate synthetic ALMA data. Identifying sinks in the simulation with protostars, we find that most dendrogram-identified cores do not contain any protostars, with many cores being transient features associated with clumpy flow along feeder filaments. Cores with protostars generally host <4, and protostellar mass is not strongly correlated with the mass of the parent cores due to their transience and shifting boundaries. Calculating observationally-relevant intensity-weighted average temperatures for all cores, we find that even at early times the core temperature distribution spans tens of Kelvin, and its width increases with time. The 1.3 mm peak and integrated intensity of the brightest mm core do not increase monotonically as the most massive associated protostar grows, indicating it cannot be assumed that brighter mm sources host more massive protostars. Leveraging the time domain, we test observational properties that have been proposed as potential evolutionary indicators and find that only the total 1.3 mm flux density of the region, the total 1.3 mm flux density in cores, and the number of cores show strong, statistically significant correlation with time.

AI.tldr: 通过合成ALMA图像研究分子云中致密气体核与年轻原恒星的关系，发现大多数核不含原恒星，核质量与原恒星质量相关性弱，毫米波亮度不能反映原恒星质量，只有区域总通量等少数参数与演化时间显著相关。
AI.motivation: 理解致密气体核与其中形成的原恒星之间的连接关系，这对于认识分子云中恒星形成过程至关重要。研究旨在通过合成观测数据探究核的性质、持久性和原恒星含量。
AI.method: 使用恒星形成模拟的时间序列，通过polaris计算尘埃辐射传输，用CASA生成合成ALMA数据，采用树状图分析识别1.3毫米ALMA图像中的核，并将模拟中的汇点与原恒星对应。
AI.result: 大多数树状图识别的核不含原恒星，许多核是沿馈丝状结构的瞬态特征。含原恒星的核通常宿主<4个原恒星，原恒星质量与母核质量相关性弱。核温度分布范围宽达数十开尔文。最亮毫米波核的峰值和积分强度不随原恒星质量单调增加。只有区域总1.3毫米通量、核内总通量和核数量与时间有强统计显著相关性。
AI.conclusion: 致密气体核通常是瞬态结构，不能简单通过毫米波亮度推断原恒星质量。大多数观测提出的演化指标缺乏统计显著性，只有少数整体参数能可靠指示演化阶段。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 致密气体核与其原恒星之间的联系是理解分子云中恒星形成的关键。本文通过后处理一个大规模整体坍缩团块中的恒星形成模拟，利用polaris计算尘埃辐射转移，并利用CASA生成合成ALMA数据，研究了通过1.3毫米ALMA图像的树状图分析所识别出的核的性质、持久性及其原恒星含量。通过将模拟中的汇点与原恒星对应，我们发现大多数树状图识别的核不包含任何原恒星，许多核是与沿供料纤维的团块流相关的瞬态特征。含有原恒星的核通常拥有少于4颗原恒星，且由于核的瞬态性和边界变化，原恒星质量与其母核质量之间没有强相关性。通过计算所有核的观测相关强度加权平均温度，我们发现即使在早期，核的温度分布也跨越数十开尔文，且其宽度随时间增加。最亮毫米核的1.3毫米峰值和积分强度并不随其中最大质量原恒星的增长而单调增加，这表明不能假设更亮的毫米源包含更大质量的原恒星。利用时间域，我们测试了被提议作为潜在演化指标的观测性质，发现只有区域的总1.3毫米通量密度、核内的总1.3毫米通量密度以及核的数量与时间表现出强且统计显著的相关性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：致密气体核通常是瞬态结构，不能简单通过毫米波亮度推断原恒星质量。大多数观测提出的演化指标缺乏统计显著性，只有少数整体参数能可靠指示演化阶段。

title: Weighing the Milky Way's Satellite Galaxies Using Pulsar Accelerations
comment: Submitted to PRD. Abstract shortened for arXiv. Comments welcome!
summary: The properties of dwarf galaxies orbiting the Milky Way (MW) are useful for testing models of the formation of our Galaxy, and by extension various theories of cosmology. Recent efforts to measure the masses of the MW's satellite dwarf galaxies have relied on the motions and positions of stars in the MW's disk and halo, which are perturbed by the passage of satellite galaxies. As there are many known processes in our Galaxy that lead to observed disequilibrium in stars, these kinematic methods have been limited by the inherent difficulty in identifying only the perturbations due to particular satellite galaxies. We present a novel method for determining the masses of two MW satellite galaxies -- the Large Magellanic Cloud (LMC) and the Sagittarius Dwarf Spheroidal Galaxy (Sgr dSph) -- using only direct, instantaneous acceleration data derived from extremely precise timing of millisecond pulsars near the Sun. As the LMC and Sgr dSph orbit the MW, they cause wave-like distortions in the structure of the disk plus a large-scale offset in the centers of mass of the dark matter halo and the baryonic disk. These two effects lead to asymmetric accelerations above and below the disk midplane near the Sun, which is observed in the pulsar acceleration data. Notably, the amplitude of this asymmetry is shown to depend on the masses of the orbiting satellites. We analyze a grid of simulations with varying masses of each satellite. We find the total (dark + baryon) mass enclosed within the tidal radius at the present day for the LMC to be 4.1 $\pm$ 1.0 $\times$ 10$^{10}$ M$_\odot$ within a radius of 16.6 kpc, and for Sgr to be 3.5 $\pm$ 2.4 $\times$ 10$^8$ M$_\odot$ within a radius of 5 kpc. These results are generally consistent and competitive with previous determinations of the masses of these objects, but entirely independent of any stellar kinematic data for the first time.

AI.tldr: 利用毫秒脉冲星精确计时数据测量银河系卫星星系质量的新方法，首次独立于恒星运动学数据

AI.method: 利用毫秒脉冲星的精确计时数据测量直接瞬时加速度，分析LMC和Sgr dSph卫星星系在银河系盘面上下引起的不对称加速度，通过模拟网格确定卫星星系质量

artifacts.abstract_zh: 围绕银河系运行的矮星系的特性对于检验我们星系形成模型以及各种宇宙学理论非常有用。最近测量银河系卫星矮星系质量的努力依赖于银河系盘和晕中恒星的运动和位置，这些恒星受到卫星星系经过的扰动。由于我们星系中存在许多已知过程会导致恒星出现观测到的不平衡状态，这些运动学方法受到仅识别特定卫星星系引起的扰动的固有困难的限制。我们提出了一种新方法，利用来自太阳附近毫秒脉冲星极其精确计时得出的直接瞬时加速度数据，来确定两个银河系卫星星系——大麦哲伦云和人马座矮椭球星系——的质量。当大麦哲伦云和人马座矮椭球星系绕银河系运行时，它们会导致盘结构产生波状扭曲，以及暗物质晕和重子盘质心的大尺度偏移。这两种效应导致太阳附近盘面上下出现不对称加速度，这在脉冲星加速度数据中观测到。值得注意的是，这种不对称性的幅度取决于轨道卫星的质量。我们分析了不同卫星质量的模拟网格。我们发现，大麦哲伦云在潮汐半径内（半径16.6千秒差距）当前包含的总（暗物质+重子）质量为4.1 ± 1.0 × 10^10太阳质量，而人马座矮椭球星系在半径5千秒差距内的质量为3.5 ± 2.4 × 10^8太阳质量。这些结果与先前对这些天体质量的测定总体一致且具有竞争力，但首次完全独立于任何恒星运动学数据。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该方法首次完全独立于恒星运动学数据，为测量银河系卫星星系质量提供了新的可靠途径，结果与先前测量一致且具有竞争力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The simulated and observed acceleration asymmetry. Panel (a) shows the vertical component of the line-of-sight acceleration ( a los , z a_{{los},z} ) for the best-fit simulation above and below the Solar position. The acceleration below the midplane has been mirrored to positive z z for easier comparison (dashed lines). This acceleration is shown at the beginning of the simulation (red), where the profile is identical above and below the midplane. At the end of the simulation, after the effects of the satellites have perturbed the galaxy, the acceleration profile is asymmetric, with larger magnitude (more negative) at positive z z than at the same distance from the midplane, but negative z z . This asymmetry can be visualized as the difference between the solid and dashed blue lines, and is plotted in panel (b). The acceleration asymmetry determined from the observed MW pulsar data is also plotted as a black dashed line in panel (b), and the 1σ \sigma and 2σ \sigma errors are shown as gray regions around the central value. The simulation agrees with the inferred acceleration asymmetry within this error region.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：模拟和观测到的加速度不对称性。面板(a)显示了最佳拟合模拟中太阳位置上方和下方的视线加速度垂直分量。为了便于比较，盘面下方的加速度已镜像到正z方向（虚线）。该加速度在模拟开始时（红色）显示，此时盘面上下方的轮廓相同。在模拟结束时，在卫星扰动星系之后，加速度轮廓不对称，在正z方向比在距盘面相同距离但负z方向处幅度更大（更负）。这种不对称性可以可视化为实线和虚线蓝色线之间的差异，并在面板(b)中绘制。从观测到的银河系脉冲星数据确定的加速度不对称性也在面板(b)中绘制为黑色虚线，1σ和2σ误差显示为中心值周围的灰色区域。模拟与推断的加速度不对称性在该误差区域内一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The vertical acceleration asymmetry at the location of the Sun for simulations with different masses of the LMC and Sgr dwarfs. Each column corresponds to a different mass of the LMC, and each row corresponds to a different mass of the Sgr dSph (see Table 3 ). Each panel shows the simulated acceleration asymmetry (acceleration above the disk minus acceleration below the disk) vs. distance from the midplane in blue, and the asymmetry inferred from the observed pulsar data as a dashed black line with 1σ \sigma error bars. The thin horizontal gray line corresponds to no asymmetry. The simulation that best recovered the MW asymmetry has a heavy LMC and a medium-sized Sgr.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于不同大麦哲伦云和人马座矮星系质量的模拟，太阳位置处的垂直加速度不对称性。每列对应不同的大麦哲伦云质量，每行对应不同的人马座矮椭球星系质量（见表3）。每个面板以蓝色显示模拟的加速度不对称性（盘面上方加速度减去盘面下方加速度）与距盘面距离的关系，并以黑色虚线显示从观测脉冲星数据推断的不对称性，附有1σ误差棒。细水平灰色线对应无不对称性。最佳恢复银河系不对称性的模拟具有一个大质量的大麦哲伦云和一个中等质量的人马座矮椭球星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Mass profiles as a function of radius for the best-fit satellite models. Also shown are various literature values for the masses; bound and/or total masses are shown as horizontal lines, and masses enclosed within some radius are shown as points with error bars. Our determination of the LMC mass broadly agrees with previous measurements of the enclosed mass at various radii. Although our best-fit total mass is somewhat large compared to the literature values, note that the definition of “total mass” is generally not the same across studies, which can lead to systematic differences. Our best-fit Sgr mass is on the lower end of the literature values when comparing the bound mass of the satellite (mass enclosed within the vertical dashed line). Estimates for the total mass of Sgr (both present-day and original) are not shown here because they are far off the vertical scale of the plot (see Table 3 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：最佳拟合卫星模型的质量随半径变化的轮廓。还显示了各种文献中的质量值；束缚质量和/或总质量显示为水平线，某个半径内的质量显示为带误差棒的点。我们对大麦哲伦云质量的测定与先前在不同半径处对包围质量的测量大致一致。尽管我们的最佳拟合总质量与文献值相比有些偏大，但请注意，“总质量”的定义在不同研究中通常不同，这可能导致系统性差异。当比较卫星的束缚质量（垂直虚线内的质量）时，我们最佳拟合的人马座矮椭球星系质量处于文献值的较低端。此处未显示人马座矮椭球星系总质量（当前和原始）的估计值，因为它们远远超出图的垂直比例（见表3）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The vertical acceleration asymmetry across a face-on projection of the disk for simulations with different masses of the LMC and Sgr dwarfs. Columns and rows are the same as in Figure 3 . Each panel shows the simulated acceleration asymmetry (acceleration above the disk minus acceleration below the disk) as color, where positive asymmetry is shown in red, and negative asymmetry (like that observed at the Sun) is blue. The location of the Sun is shown as a gold star. The structure induced by the two satellites is complicated and nonlinear, although there are potentially patterns in the asymmetries along the same rows or columns.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对于不同大麦哲伦云和人马座矮星系质量的模拟，盘面正面投影上的垂直加速度不对称性。列和行与图3相同。每个面板以颜色显示模拟的加速度不对称性（盘面上方加速度减去盘面下方加速度），其中正不对称性显示为红色，负不对称性（如在太阳处观测到的）显示为蓝色。太阳的位置显示为金色星形。两个卫星引起的结构复杂且非线性，尽管沿相同行或列可能存在不对称性的模式。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The vertical acceleration asymmetry across a face-on projection of the disk for simulations with different combinations of the LMC and Sgr dwarfs. The top row shows simulations with only the LMC, the middle row shows simulations with only Sgr, and the bottom row shows simulations with both dwarfs. The mass of each dwarf increases from left to right across columns. The location of the Sun is shown as a gold star. The effect of increasing a satellite’s mass is not linear, in that a larger mass does not correspond to stronger accelerations in identical locations, but rather it changes both the relative locations and magnitudes of the acceleration asymmetries across the disk. Also note that the accelerations do not add linearly; the accelerations observed in a simulation with only the LMC plus the accelerations from a Sgr-only simulation do not necessarily correspond to the accelerations observed in a simulation with both of those dwarfs, even if they have the same mass.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：对于不同大麦哲伦云和人马座矮星系组合的模拟，盘面正面投影上的垂直加速度不对称性。顶行显示仅包含大麦哲伦云的模拟，中间行显示仅包含人马座矮椭球星系的模拟，底行显示包含两个矮星系的模拟。每个矮星系的质量从左到右逐列增加。太阳的位置显示为金色星形。增加卫星质量的效果不是线性的，即更大的质量并不对应于相同位置更强的加速度，而是改变了盘面上加速度不对称性的相对位置和幅度。还要注意，加速度不是线性相加的；在仅包含大麦哲伦云的模拟中观测到的加速度加上仅包含人马座矮椭球星系的模拟中的加速度，不一定对应于包含这两个矮星系（即使质量相同）的模拟中观测到的加速度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Vertical disk structure in the best-fit simulation. All panels show a face-on projection of the disk, and the location of the Sun is shown as a golden star. Panel (a) shows the mean vertical acceleration across the disk. Panel (b) shows the vertical acceleration asymmetry across the disk, calculated as the difference in a los , z a_{{los},z} at z = 1 z=1 kpc and z = − 1 z=-1 kpc from the midplane. Panel (c) shows the mean height of the disk stars (i.e. the warp).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：最佳拟合模拟中的垂直盘结构。所有面板显示盘面的正面投影，太阳的位置显示为金色星形。面板(a)显示盘面上的平均垂直加速度。面板(b)显示盘面上的垂直加速度不对称性，计算为距盘面z=1千秒差距和z=-1千秒差距处视线加速度垂直分量的差值。面板(c)显示盘面恒星的平均高度（即翘曲）。

title: Pressure and Star Formation in LITTLE THINGS Dwarf Irregular Galaxies
summary: The surface densities of star formation, Sigma_SFR, in 24 dwarf irregular (dIrr) galaxies from the LITTLE THINGS survey are combined with gas surface densities and midplane pressures to examine the correlations found previously for spiral galaxies. The pressure is the weight of the disk inside the gas layer, including gas, stars, and dark matter, which usually dominates disk gravity in dIrrs. We compare the results to the outer part of M33, which has similar local properties but a slightly higher metallicity, enabling the detection of CO. All the data are convolved to the HI beam, but to study the effects of resolution, the galaxies are examined first with average radial profiles, and then with maps having 1.5" pixels and 244 pc pixels. The correlations are found to be independent of resolution from 24 pc to 424 pc. The average ratio of molecular to atomic surface density is estimated to be 0.23+-0.1, from the H_2 surface density in M33 compared to the HI surface density at the same Sigma_SFR in the dIrrs. With this ratio, the average star formation rate per molecule is about the same for all the dIrrs, and a factor of 2 less than the rate in M33. The pressure in dIrrs is so low that CO is essentially a dense gas tracer, with the same surface density threshold at the low metallicities of dIrrs as HCN has in spiral galaxies. As a result, CO regions in dIrrs should be strongly self-gravitating.

AI.tldr: 研究结合24个矮不规则星系数据，分析恒星形成率与气体密度、压力关系，发现与螺旋星系相似，但分子气体比例较低，CO在低金属丰度下成为致密气体示踪剂。
AI.motivation: 研究矮不规则星系中恒星形成率与气体表面密度、中平面压力的相关性，并与螺旋星系进行比较，探索低金属丰度环境下恒星形成的物理机制。
AI.method: 使用LITTLE THINGS调查的24个矮不规则星系数据，结合气体表面密度和压力测量，与M33星系外区进行比较。采用不同分辨率分析（24-424 pc），通过径向平均剖面和像素图研究分辨率影响。
AI.result: 相关性在不同分辨率下保持一致；矮不规则星系分子与原子气体表面密度比平均为0.23±0.1；矮不规则星系单位分子气体恒星形成率相似，但比M33低约2倍；低金属丰度下CO成为致密气体示踪剂，与螺旋星系中HCN作用类似。
AI.conclusion: 矮不规则星系中恒星形成与气体密度、压力的关系与螺旋星系相似，但低金属丰度环境导致分子气体比例较低，CO成为致密气体示踪剂，这些区域应具有强自引力特性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 来自LITTLE THINGS巡天的24个矮不规则星系的恒星形成面密度（Sigma_SFR）与气体面密度及中平面压力相结合，以检验先前在旋涡星系中发现的关联。压力是气体层内盘面的重量，包括气体、恒星和暗物质，在矮不规则星系中通常主导盘面引力。我们将结果与M33的外部区域进行比较，该区域具有相似的局部性质但金属丰度略高，从而能够探测到CO。所有数据均卷积至HI波束，但为研究分辨率的影响，首先使用平均径向轮廓检查星系，然后使用具有1.5角秒像素和244 pc像素的星图。发现这些关联在24 pc至424 pc的分辨率范围内与分辨率无关。根据M33中H_2面密度与矮不规则星系中相同Sigma_SFR处的HI面密度比较，估计分子与原子面密度的平均比值为0.23±0.1。利用该比值，所有矮不规则星系的每个分子的平均恒星形成率大致相同，且比M33中的速率低2倍。矮不规则星系中的压力非常低，以至于CO本质上是一种致密气体示踪剂，在矮不规则星系的低金属丰度下具有与旋涡星系中HCN相同的面密度阈值。因此，矮不规则星系中的CO区域应具有强自引力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：矮不规则星系中恒星形成与气体密度、压力的关系与螺旋星系相似，但低金属丰度环境导致分子气体比例较低，CO成为致密气体示踪剂，这些区域应具有强自引力特性。

title: Model independent approach towards measuring expansion and growth factor from next generation galaxy clustering and lensing angular power spectrum
comment: to be submitted - comments and request for missing references are welcomed
summary: In this work we perform Fisher forecasts on the expansion and the growth factors following model independent approaches from 3x2pt joint analysis of the galaxy lensing, clustering, and their cross-correlated spectra at the linear, and extending as well to non linear scales. For that, instead of choosing a specific model for the matter power spectrum, the main ingredient of these probes, we express it by parametrizing its components, such as the expansion and the growth factor, and those of the standard halo model and excursion set theory in several z bins, besides to the different bias and non-linear bias modelling functions. We apply the technique to Euclid, Rubin and SKA public specifications in the range 0.2 < z < 1.8 and show that one can then obtain model-independent constraints of the expansion E(z i ) and the growth factor G(z i ). We also show the change in gain in precision at each z- shell when going from pessimistic cut at linear scales to more optimistic non-linear settings, or the difference between using each survey alone or a combination of all of them, or the impact from fixing or adding more degrees of freedom in the non-linear modeling. We found that, in the most agnostic case, one can still reach high precision on E(z i ) in the order of the percent level when combining the three surveys at once while the growth factor G(z i ) has for the same settings one order of magnitude weaker constraints. We also found for both factors, an improvement that can reach one order of magnitude in precision when passing from linear to non-linear scales. We conclude that we will be able to constrain the two important factors of the background evolution and structure formation of the Universe when using non linear scales and the combined power of future surveys even in the most agnostic approaches.

artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要的结论：即使采用最不可知论的方法，通过利用非线性尺度和未来巡天项目的组合能力，我们仍能有效约束宇宙背景演化和结构形成的两个重要因子。这种方法为模型无关的宇宙学研究提供了有前景的途径。

title: High-energy astrochemistry in the molecular interstellar medium
comment: Accepted by ACS Earth and Space Chemistry (Eric Herbst Festschrift)
summary: In the past decade, there has been a significant shift in astrochemistry with a renewed focus on the role of non-thermal processes on the molecular interstellar medium, in particular energetic particles (such as cosmic ray particles and fast electrons) and X-ray radiation. This has been brought about in large part due to new observations of interstellar complex organic molecules (iCOMS) in environments that would inhibit their formation, such as cold, dense gas in prestellar cores or in the highly energetic environments in galactic centers. In parallel, there has been a plethora of new laboratory investigations on the role of high-energy radiation and electrons on the chemistry of astrophysical ices, demonstrating the ability of this radiation to induce complex chemistry. In recent years, theoretical models have also begun to include newer cosmic-ray-driven processes in both the gas and ice phases. In this review, we unify aspects of the chemistry driven by X-ray radiation and energetic particles into a ``high-energy astrochemistry'', defining this term and reviewing the underlying chemical processes. We conclude by examining various laboratories where high-energy astrochemistry is at play and identify future issues to be tackled.

title: KURVS: chemical properties from multiple strong line calibrations for star-forming galaxies at $z\sim1.5$
summary: Gas-phase oxygen abundance (metallicity) properties can be constrained through emission line analyses, and are of great importance to investigate galaxy evolution histories. We present an analysis of the integrated and spatially-resolved rest-frame optical emission line properties of the ionised gas in 43 star-forming galaxies at $z\sim1.5$ in the KMOS Ultra-deep Rotational Velocity Survey (KURVS). Using the [NII]$\lambda6584$/H$α$ (N$_2$), ([OII]$λ\lambda3727,9+$[OIII]$λ\lambda4959,5007$)/H$β$ (R23), and for the first time [NII]$\lambda6584$/[OII]$λ\lambda3727,9$ (N$_2$O$_2$) indicators at this redshift, we measure the gas-phase metallicities and their radial gradients. On $\sim4$-kpc scales metallicity gradients measured from N$_2$O$_2$ and those measured from N$_2$ are in good agreement when considering the spatial distributions of dust in each galaxy, as parameterised by dust attenuation radial gradients. We report a nearly flat metallicity gradient distribution typically at $z\sim1.5$, with the 50th, 16th and 84th percentiles at $0.01$, $-0.03$, and $0.05$ dex kpc$^{-1}$, respectively. The findings agree well with previous observational studies and simulations at this epoch. We ascribe the observed negative metallicity gradients to a natural result from self-regulating systems, and the positive ones to potential galactic fountains and higher merger rates.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 气相氧丰度（金属丰度）特性可通过发射线分析加以约束，对于研究星系演化历史具有重要意义。我们利用KMOS超深旋转速度巡天（KURVS）中43个红移z~1.5的恒星形成星系，分析了其电离气体的积分和空间分辨静止光学发射线特性。通过使用[NII]λ6584/Hα（N₂）、([OII]λλ3727,9+[OIII]λλ4959,5007)/Hβ（R23）以及首次在该红移下应用的[NII]λ6584/[OII]λλ3727,9（N₂O₂）指示剂，我们测量了气相金属丰度及其径向梯度。在约4千秒差距尺度上，当考虑每个星系中尘埃的空间分布（以尘埃消光径向梯度参数化）时，由N₂O₂和N₂测得的金属丰度梯度高度一致。我们报告了在z~1.5时近乎平坦的金属丰度梯度分布，其第50、16和84百分位数分别为0.01、-0.03和0.05 dex kpc⁻¹。这些发现与同期先前的观测研究和模拟结果吻合良好。我们将观测到的负金属丰度梯度归因于自调节系统的自然结果，而正梯度则可能源于潜在的星系喷泉和较高的并合率。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：观测到的负金属丰度梯度是自调节系统的自然结果，正梯度可能源于星系喷泉和较高的并合率，为理解星系演化提供了重要线索。

title: Tracking Protostellar Variability in Massive Protoclusters with ALMA: I. Insights from QUARKS and MaMMOtH
comment: Submitted to ApJ. Comments are welcome
summary: Millimeter/submillimeter variability is often attributed to dynamical disk-mediated accretion, yet detection is limited to low-mass protostars in nearby clouds. Recent observations have also revealed significant (sub)millimeter variability in high-mass protostars, but the confirmed cases are scarce and lack systematic monitoring. In this work, we analyzed multi-epoch Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) Band 6 (1.3 mm) continuum observations of 22 massive protoclusters, with epoch separations ranging from a few hours to more than two years, while achieving a consistent angular resolution of approximately 0.3 arcsec. These data allow us to track variability of protostars across a broader mass range and in an environment markedly different from nearby clouds. Using a custom processing pipeline for data reduction, image alignment, and relative flux calibration, we achieve high-precision flux measurements and, for the first time, investigate millimeter variability in massive protoclusters based on interferometric data in a statistical manner. Applying the astrodendro algorithm, we identified 383 condensations and tracked their variations in peak intensities. Standard deviation analysis and difference maps reveal five variable sources, corresponding to a lower limit of 1.3% on the variable fraction. Among these, I13111-6228 stands out as it hosts a hypercompact H II region that exhibits a 68% increase in continuum peak intensity over one year, with an uncertainty of 2%. This supports the burst-mode accretion picture in massive star formation as a viable route for the formation of massive stars.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多时期ALMA观测分析了22个大质量原星团中383个凝聚体的毫米波变异性，首次在大质量原星团中基于干涉数据进行统计性变异性研究，发现5个变源（变异性下限1.3%），其中I13111-6228在一年内峰值强度增加68%，支持大质量恒星形成中的爆发式吸积模型。
AI.motivation: 毫米/亚毫米波变异性通常归因于盘介导的动态吸积过程，但现有观测主要局限于近邻云中的低质量原恒星。虽然近期观测也发现了大质量原恒星中的显著变异性，但确认案例稀少且缺乏系统性监测。本研究旨在通过多时期ALMA观测，在大质量原星团环境中研究毫米波变异性，探索更广泛质量范围内的原恒星变异性特征。
AI.method: 研究分析了22个大质量原星团的多时期ALMA Band 6（1.3毫米）连续谱观测数据，时间间隔从几小时到两年以上，保持约0.3角秒的一致角分辨率。使用定制处理流程进行数据缩减、图像对齐和相对流量校准，实现高精度流量测量。应用astrodendro算法识别383个凝聚体，通过标准差分析和差异图追踪其峰值强度变化。
AI.result: 研究发现5个变源，对应变异性下限为1.3%。其中I13111-6228最为突出，其超致密H II区在一年内连续谱峰值强度增加了68%（不确定性2%）。这是首次基于干涉数据对大质量原星团进行统计性毫米波变异性研究，为理解大质量恒星形成过程提供了重要观测证据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证实了大质量原星团中存在毫米波变异性，支持大质量恒星形成中的爆发式吸积模型。I13111-6228的显著亮度变化为爆发式吸积提供了直接观测证据，表明这种机制可能是大质量恒星形成的重要途径。研究结果为理解大质量恒星形成的动力学过程提供了新的观测约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 毫米/亚毫米波段的变异性通常归因于由盘介导的动力学吸积过程，然而，目前对这类变异性的探测仅限于邻近分子云中的低质量原恒星。近期观测也在高质量原恒星中发现了显著的（亚）毫米波段变异性，但已确认的案例稀少且缺乏系统性监测。本研究分析了阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米波阵（ALMA）第6波段（1.3毫米）对22个大质量原星团的多历元连续谱观测数据，历元间隔从数小时到超过两年不等，并实现了约0.3角秒的一致角分辨率。这些数据使我们能够追踪更宽质量范围内原恒星的变异性，并研究一种与邻近分子云截然不同的环境。通过采用定制的处理流程进行数据降噪、图像对齐和相对流量校准，我们实现了高精度流量测量，并首次基于干涉数据以统计方式研究了大质量原星团中的毫米波变异性。应用astrodendro算法，我们识别出383个凝聚体并追踪其峰值强度的变化。标准差分析和差异图揭示了5个变源，对应的变源比例下限为1.3%。其中，I13111-6228尤为突出，它包含一个超致密H II区，其连续谱峰值强度在一年内增加了68%，不确定度为2%。这支持了大质量恒星形成中的爆发式吸积模型，表明该模型是大质量恒星形成的一条可行路径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：该研究证实了大质量原星团中存在毫米波变异性，支持大质量恒星形成中的爆发式吸积模型。I13111-6228的显著亮度变化为爆发式吸积提供了直接观测证据，表明这种机制可能是大质量恒星形成的重要途径。研究结果为理解大质量恒星形成的动力学过程提供了新的观测约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Processing workflow. Schematic overview of the four main processing steps adopted in this study. The process begins with data selection and calibration, including dataset cross-matching and ALMA pipeline calibration to prepare the data for further steps (Sect. II ). In the second step, imaging and self-calibration, we perform spectral Line flagging and self-calibration (Sect. III.1 ), followed by smoothing all epochs of each source to a common beam to produce consistent continuum images across epochs (Sect. III.2 ). In the third step, condensation extraction, involves aligning images across epochs, identifying compact condensations in both datasets, and applying a unified mask for consistent source extraction (Sect. IV.1 ). Finally, in flux comparison, we perform relative calibration (Sect. IV.2 ), track the peak intensity evolution of each condensation across epochs (Sect. IV.3 ), and evaluate variability using both the standard deviation method (Sect. IV.3.1 ) and the difference map analysis (Sect. IV.3.2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：处理流程。本研究采用的四个主要处理步骤的示意图。流程始于数据选择与校准，包括数据集交叉匹配和ALMA管道校准，为后续步骤准备数据（第II节）。第二步，成像与自校准，我们进行谱线标记和自校准（第III.1节），然后将每个源的所有历元平滑至共同波束，以生成跨历元一致的连续谱图像（第III.2节）。第三步，凝聚体提取，涉及跨历元图像对齐、在两个数据集中识别致密凝聚体，并应用统一掩模进行一致的源提取（第IV.1节）。最后，在流量比较中，我们进行相对校准（第IV.2节），追踪每个凝聚体跨历元的峰值强度演化（第IV.3节），并使用标准差方法（第IV.3.1节）和差异图分析（第IV.3.2节）评估变异性。

title: Updated and Projected Cosmic Microwave Background Bounds on WIMP Annihilation
summary: We derive updated Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB) constraints on annihilating dark matter, and present forecasts for upcoming CMB surveys. We show that the addition of recent temperature, polarization, and lensing data from ground-based experiments yields only minor improvements ($\approx 10\%$) compared to Planck bounds, confirming that the sensitivity remains dominated by the large-scale E-mode polarization. Forecasts, using a LiteBIRD-like setup, indicate that pairing a low-noise, wide-sky satellite at $\ell < 200$ with high-resolution ground observations nearly saturates the cosmic-variance limit, improving bounds by $\approx 60\%$, where our derived 95th percentile limit is $p_{\rm ann} < 1.27{\times}10^{-28}\,\mathrm{cm^{3}\,s^{-1}\,GeV^{-1}}$. We also consider the inclusion of B-mode polarization for a realistic future experiment.

AI.tldr: 该论文更新了湮灭暗物质的CMB约束，并预测了未来CMB观测的改进潜力。研究表明，近期地面实验数据仅带来约10%的改进，而未来LiteBIRD类卫星与地面高分辨率观测结合可将约束提高约60%，接近宇宙方差极限。
AI.motivation: 研究湮灭暗物质对宇宙微波背景辐射的影响，更新现有约束并评估未来CMB观测实验的改进潜力，为暗物质探测提供更精确的界限。
AI.method: 结合近期地面实验的温度、偏振和透镜数据更新CMB约束，使用LiteBIRD类卫星设置进行预测分析，评估低噪声宽天区卫星与高分辨率地面观测的组合效果，并考虑B模偏振在未来实验中的潜在贡献。
AI.result: 近期地面实验数据仅带来约10%的改进，确认灵敏度仍由大尺度E模偏振主导。未来LiteBIRD类卫星与地面观测结合可将约束提高约60%，接近宇宙方差极限，95%置信度上限为p_ann < 1.27×10^{-28} cm^3 s^{-1} GeV^{-1}。
AI.conclusion: 未来CMB观测实验，特别是低噪声宽天区卫星与高分辨率地面观测的组合，有望显著提高湮灭暗物质的探测灵敏度，接近理论极限，为暗物质研究提供更严格的约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们推导了更新的宇宙微波背景（CMB）对湮灭暗物质的约束，并给出了即将开展的CMB巡天的预测。我们表明，与普朗克边界相比，来自地面实验的最新温度、极化和透镜数据的加入仅带来微小改进（约10%），证实了灵敏度仍由大尺度E模极化主导。使用类似LiteBIRD的配置进行的预测表明，将低噪声、宽天区卫星在ℓ<200的数据与高分辨率地面观测相结合，几乎达到了宇宙方差极限，将边界改进了约60%，其中我们推导的95百分位极限为p_ann < 1.27×10^{-28} cm^3 s^{-1} GeV^{-1}。我们还考虑了在现实未来实验中加入B模极化的影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，未来CMB观测实验，特别是低噪声宽天区卫星与高分辨率地面观测的组合，有望显著提高湮灭暗物质的探测灵敏度，接近理论极限，为暗物质研究提供更严格的约束。

title: MAUVE-MUSE: A Star Formation-driven Outflow Caught in the Act of Quenching the Stripped Virgo Galaxy NGC 4064
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 1 table, accepted for publication in the Astrophysical Journal Letters
summary: The rapid quenching of satellite galaxies in dense environments is often attributed to environmental processes such as ram pressure stripping. However, stripping alone cannot fully account for the removal of dense, star-forming gas in many satellites, particularly in their inner regions. Recent models and indirect observations have suggested that star formation-driven outflows may play a critical role in expelling this remaining gas, yet direct evidence for such feedback-driven quenching remains limited. Here we report the discovery of an ionized gas outflow in NGC 4064, a Virgo cluster satellite that has already lost most of its cold gas through environmental stripping. MUSE observations from the Multiphase Astrophysics to Unveil the Virgo Environment (MAUVE) survey reveal a bi-polar outflow driven by residual, centrally concentrated star formation in NGC 4064 - despite its current star formation rate being ~0.4 dex below the star-forming main sequence due to prior interaction with the cluster environment. The outflow's mass loading factor is ~2, suggesting that stellar feedback could remove the remaining gas on timescales shorter than those required for depletion by star formation alone. These results demonstrate that even modest but centrally concentrated star formation can drive efficient feedback in stripped satellites, accelerating quenching in the final stages of their evolution.

AI.tldr: 在Virgo星系团卫星星系NGC 4064中发现电离气体外流，表明恒星反馈在环境剥离后的最终淬灭阶段起关键作用
AI.motivation: 环境过程（如冲压剥离）不能完全解释卫星星系中致密、恒星形成气体的移除，特别是在内部区域。需要直接证据证明恒星形成驱动的外流在淬灭过程中的作用。
AI.method: 使用MAUVE巡天的MUSE观测数据，分析Virgo星系团卫星星系NGC 4064的电离气体外流特征，计算质量加载因子。
AI.result: 在NGC 4064中发现双极外流，由残余的、中心集中的恒星形成驱动。质量加载因子约为2，表明恒星反馈可以在比单纯恒星形成消耗更短的时间尺度上移除剩余气体。
AI.conclusion: 即使适度的中心集中恒星形成也能在剥离的卫星星系中驱动有效反馈，加速其演化最终阶段的淬灭过程。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 卫星星系在致密环境中快速淬灭通常归因于冲压剥离等环境过程。然而，仅凭剥离无法完全解释许多卫星星系中致密恒星形成气体的移除，尤其是在其内部区域。最近的模型和间接观测表明，恒星形成驱动的外流可能在排出这些剩余气体中发挥关键作用，但此类反馈驱动的淬灭的直接证据仍然有限。本文报告了在室女座星系团卫星星系NGC 4064中发现电离气体外流，该星系已通过环境剥离失去了大部分冷气体。来自MAUVE巡天的MUSE观测揭示了一个由残余的中心集中恒星形成驱动的双极外流——尽管其当前恒星形成率因先前与星系团环境的相互作用而比恒星形成主序低约0.4 dex。外流的质量负载因子约为2，表明恒星反馈能够在比单独恒星形成消耗所需时间更短的时标上移除剩余气体。这些结果表明，即使是适度的中心集中恒星形成也能在剥离的卫星星系中驱动有效反馈，加速其演化最终阶段的淬灭过程。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：即使适度的中心集中恒星形成也能在剥离的卫星星系中驱动有效反馈，加速其演化最终阶段的淬灭过程。

title: On the validity of the continuity equation in a modified gravity framework with CMB, DES 3x2pt and tomographic ISW data
summary: In this work we propose a phenomenological modification to the continuity equation at the linear perturbation level and test it using combinations of the CMB temperature, polarization and lensing potential angular spectrum, the ISW-galaxy cross power spectrum and the 3$\times$2pt lensing and galaxy clustering from DES survey. We investigate two parametrisations of this modification, both proportional to a new parameter $A_c$, which is assumed to be either constant in time, or proportional to the scale factor $a$, in order to be more relevant at late times. We find DES and ISW data to be consistent with the standard continuity equation when $A_c$ is constant, but 2--3$σ$ hints of a non-zero modification appear when Planck data is included. The model $A_c \propto a$ results in stronger tensions. We also test the effects of including the common extra parameters $μ$ and $η$ that modify the Poisson equation and Weyl potential. Although $A_c$, $μ$ and $η$ are correlated, we still find non-zero $A_c$ when Planck data is included or without Planck if $A_c \propto a$ and only either $η$ or $μ$ are allowed to vary. We conclude that violations of the continuity equation should be considered with care when testing additional deviations from general relativity.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出在微扰水平上对连续性方程进行唯象修正，通过多种宇宙学观测数据测试两种参数化方案，发现DES和ISW数据与标准连续性方程一致，但加入Planck数据后出现2-3σ的非零修正迹象。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索广义相对论之外的修正理论，通过修改连续性方程来测试宇宙学模型，特别是在微扰水平上检验物质密度演化是否遵循标准连续性方程。
AI.method: 提出两种参数化方案：1) 新参数Ac为常数；2) Ac与尺度因子a成正比（更相关于晚期宇宙）。使用CMB温度、偏振和透镜势角谱、ISW-星系交叉功率谱、DES巡天的3×2点透镜和星系成团性等组合数据进行约束分析。
AI.result: DES和ISW数据与标准连续性方程一致（Ac为常数时），但加入Planck数据后出现2-3σ的非零修正迹象。Ac∝a模型产生更强的张力。当考虑修改泊松方程和韦尔势的额外参数μ和η时，虽然参数相关，但在包含Planck数据或仅允许η或μ变化时仍发现非零Ac。
AI.conclusion: 连续性方程的违反在测试广义相对论的额外偏离时应谨慎考虑，观测数据对修正参数显示出一定的敏感性，特别是当包含Planck数据时。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为修改引力框架下的连续性方程检验，与用户Zotero库中强引力透镜、暗物质、星系形成等核心主题仅有非常间接的关联。用户库中虽出现'lensing'和'polarization'关键词，但本文的弱引力透镜（DES 3x2pt）和ISW效应与用户关注的强引力透镜、星系尺度物理方向差异显著。无共同作者。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们在线性扰动水平上对连续性方程提出了一种现象学修正，并使用CMB温度、极化和透镜势角功率谱、ISW-星系交叉功率谱以及DES巡天的3×2pt透镜和星系成团性组合进行了测试。我们研究了这种修正的两种参数化形式，两者均与一个新参数$A_c$成正比，该参数假设为时间常数或与尺度因子$a$成正比，以便在晚期更相关。我们发现，当$A_c$为常数时，DES和ISW数据与标准连续性方程一致，但当包含Planck数据时，出现了2-3σ的非零修正迹象。模型$A_c \propto a$导致了更强的张力。我们还测试了包含修改泊松方程和Weyl势的常见额外参数$μ$和$η$的影响。尽管$A_c$、$μ$和$η$是相关的，但当包含Planck数据时，或者在不包含Planck但$A_c \propto a$且仅允许$η$或$μ$变化时，我们仍然发现$A_c$非零。我们得出结论，在测试广义相对论的额外偏离时，应谨慎考虑连续性方程的违反。

title: $^{12}$CO $J$=3--2 Observations of Tycho's supernova remnant: constraints on the environmental gas properties
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures. This article is accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: Recent observations suggest that Tycho's supernova remnant (SNR; SN 1572) is expanding into a cavity wall of molecular clouds (MCs), which decelerate the SNR and influence its multi-wavelength morphology. To constrain the physical properties of environmental MCs and search for heated gas, we perform a JCMT $^{12}$CO $J$=3--2 observation and compare with previous $^{12}$CO $J$=2--1, $^{12}$CO $J$=1--0 and $^{13}$CO $J$=1--0 data. We present the $^{12}$CO $J$=3--2 map toward Tycho and show that the $^{12}$CO $J$=3--2 spatial distribution and line profiles are similar to those of the lower-$J$ CO lines. By comparing the multiple transitions of CO and the RADEX (Radiative transfer code in non-Local Thermodynamic Equilibrium) models, we constrain the physical properties of molecular gas surrounding Tycho: the northern cloud has a molecular column density of $N({\rm H}_{2})=0.5$ -- $4.5\times 10^{22}$ cm$^{-2}$, while other regions have $N({\rm H}_{2})=0.2$ -- $3.9\times10^{21}$ cm$^{-2}$; the kinetic temperatures $T_{\rm k}$ of these clouds are in the range of 9 -- 22 K and the volume densities $n({\rm H}_{2})$ are 20 -- $700$ cm$^{-3}$. We also discuss the difficulty in finding hot molecular gas shocked by such a young SNR. We estimate that the shocked molecular layer can be as thin as 0.003 pc, corresponding to $0.2''$ at the distance of 2.5 kpc, which is 2 orders of magnitude smaller than the angular resolution of current CO observations. Therefore, our molecular observations are largely insensitive to the thin shocked gas layer; instead, they detect the environmental gas.

AI.tldr: 通过JCMT的12CO J=3-2观测结合其他CO谱线数据，研究了第谷超新星遗迹周围分子云的性质，发现其膨胀进入分子云空腔壁，约束了分子气体的物理参数，并指出当前观测难以探测到超新星激波加热的薄层热分子气体。
AI.motivation: 第谷超新星遗迹（SN 1572）正在膨胀进入分子云空腔壁，这种环境会影响遗迹的膨胀速度和多波段形态。需要约束周围分子云的物理性质并寻找被加热的气体，以理解超新星遗迹与环境相互作用的物理过程。
AI.method: 使用JCMT望远镜进行12CO J=3-2观测，并与已有的12CO J=2-1、12CO J=1-0和13CO J=1-0数据进行比较。通过多谱线CO数据结合RADEX（非局部热动平衡辐射转移代码）模型，约束分子气体的物理性质。
AI.result: 12CO J=3-2的空间分布和谱线轮廓与低J CO谱线相似。北部分子云的分子柱密度为N(H2)=0.5-4.5×10^22 cm^-2，其他区域为N(H2)=0.2-3.9×10^21 cm^-2。这些云的动力学温度Tk在9-22K范围内，体积密度n(H2)为20-700 cm^-3。激波加热的分子层可能薄至0.003 pc（在2.5 kpc距离处对应0.2角秒），远小于当前CO观测的角分辨率。
AI.conclusion: 当前观测主要探测的是环境分子气体，而非超新星激波加热的薄层热分子气体。激波加热的分子层太薄，超出了当前CO观测的分辨率极限，因此难以直接探测。研究结果为理解第谷超新星遗迹与分子云环境的相互作用提供了重要约束。

title: Strong Bars, Strong Inflow: The Effect of Bar Strength on Gas Inflow
summary: Stellar bars are elongated structures in disk galaxies that can torque and funnel gas inward, influencing galaxy evolution. While strong bars are known to induce rapid inflow, the impact of weaker bars remains less certain. We collected spectroscopic data using the Isaac Newton Telescope to analyze 18 nearby galaxies (strongly barred, weakly barred, and unbarred) drawn from Galaxy Zoo DESI. We obtained spatial profiles of equivalent width (EW) and ionized gas velocity dispersion by fitting Gaussian profiles to the Hα emission line. Strongly barred galaxies exhibit a distinctive three-peaked EW[Hα] structure, consistent with inward funneling of gas. Weakly barred systems lack this pattern, which suggests limited inflow. Velocity dispersion distributions further distinguish the bar types, with strongly barred galaxies showing significantly higher values than weakly barred and unbarred systems. These results suggest that strong bars drive gas inflow, while weak bars exert a limited dynamical influence.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星棒是盘状星系中的细长结构，能够施加力矩并引导气体向内流动，从而影响星系演化。虽然强棒已知能引发快速内流，但弱棒的影响仍不太确定。我们利用艾萨克·牛顿望远镜收集了来自星系动物园DESI的18个邻近星系（包括强棒、弱棒和无棒星系）的光谱数据。通过对Hα发射线拟合高斯轮廓，我们获得了等效宽度（EW）和电离气体速度弥散的空间分布。强棒星系展现出独特的三峰EW[Hα]结构，与气体向内汇聚一致。弱棒星系缺乏这种模式，表明内流有限。速度弥散分布进一步区分了棒的类型，强棒星系的值显著高于弱棒和无棒星系。这些结果表明，强棒驱动气体内流，而弱棒对气体动力学影响有限。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：强棒旋星系能有效驱动气体向内流动，而弱棒旋星系对气体动力学影响有限。

title: Deuterium fractionation and CO depletion in Barnard 5
summary: Deuterium fractionation provides a key diagnostic of the physical and chemical evolution of prestellar and protostellar cores, where it is strongly linked to CO depletion in cold, dense gas. We present the first spatially resolved maps of deuterium fraction and CO depletion in the Barnard 5 (B5) region of the Perseus molecular cloud, covering both a starless core and the protostellar core hosting the Class 0/I source IRAS 03445+3242. Using IRAM 30~m observations of N$_2$H$^+$(1--0), N$_2$D$^+$(1--0), H$^{13}$CO$^+$(1--0), and DCO$^+$(2--1), complemented by C$^{18}$O(2--1) data, we derive column density, deuterium fraction, and CO depletion maps. We find that the deuterium fraction in both mentioned nitrogen- and carbon-bearing species increases from the protostellar to the starless core, reaching $R_D^{\rm N_2H^+}=0.43\pm0.10$ and $R_D^{\rm HCO^+}=0.09\pm0.02$ in the starless core, compared with $0.15\pm0.03$ and $0.05\pm0.01$, respectively, in the protostellar core. The CO depletion factor also rises from $4.1\pm0.1$ to $5.0\pm0.1$ across the same transition. While the embedded YSO reduces deuteration in the dense inner gas, the less dense envelope traced by HCO$^+$ is only slightly affected at our resolution. Our analysis confirms that CO freeze-out and the presence of a protostar jointly regulate deuterium chemistry in star-forming regions.

AI.tldr: 本文首次绘制了Perseus分子云Barnard 5区域氘分馏和CO耗竭的空间分布图，发现从原恒星核到无星核，氘分馏和CO耗竭均显著增加，证实了CO冻结和原恒星存在共同调控恒星形成区域的氘化学。
AI.motivation: 氘分馏是研究前恒星和原恒星核物理化学演化的重要诊断工具，与冷密气体中的CO耗竭密切相关。然而，对氘分馏和CO耗竭的空间分布研究仍不充分，特别是在同时包含无星核和原恒星核的区域。

title: Evidence of galaxy cluster rotation in the cosmic microwave background
comment: Prepared for submissin to PRL, comments welcome!
summary: We report the first robust evidence for the rotational kinematic Sunyaev-Zel'dovich (rkSZ) effect, produced by the Thomson scattering of cosmic microwave background (CMB) photons off rotating intracluster gas. By combining CMB intensity and polarization measurements from the $\it{Planck}$ satellite with spectroscopic member-galaxy redshifts from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey in a sample of 25 X-ray cross-matched, low-redshift ($0.02< z< 0.09)$, massive ($10^{13.9}\lesssim M_{\rm 500c}/M_\odot \lesssim 10^{14.6}$) galaxy clusters, we detect a dipolar rkSZ signature aligned with the estimated rotation direction of each cluster, ruling out a chance fluctuation at 99.98% confidence (3.6$σ$). The significance of this measurement is enhanced by several new methodological improvements for isolating the rkSZ signal from primary CMB fluctuations and noise. The amplitude and shape of the signal are qualitatively consistent with predictions from state-of-the-art hydrodynamical simulations. These results establish a new tool with which to probe the dynamical state of galaxy clusters using CMB data.

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top: oriented and weighted stack of filtered and cleaned Planck CMB temperature data on 25 galaxy clusters. The cutouts are rescaled in units of R 500 ​ c R_{500c} and aligned with the estimated cluster rotation direction, with the right side ( x ≥ 0 x\geq 0 ) rotating towards the observer, as indicated by the white arrow. A dipole signal is clearly visible along the expected rotation direction. Bottom: significance of the dipole estimated from the oriented stack (red line) compared with the noise distribution obtained by repeating the weighted stack 30,000 times at random locations. The measured dipole amplitude exceeds 99.98% of the random realizations, indicating strong evidence ( 3.6 ​ σ 3.6\sigma ) of cluster rotation. The black dashed line shows the best-fit Gaussian to the noise.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部：对25个星系团的滤波和清洁后的普朗克CMB温度数据进行定向和加权叠加。剪切图像以R_500c为单位缩放，并与估计的星系团旋转方向对齐，右侧（x≥0）朝向观测者旋转，如白色箭头所示。沿预期旋转方向清晰可见一个偶极信号。底部：从定向叠加估计的偶极显著性（红线）与通过随机位置重复加权叠加30,000次获得的噪声分布比较。测量的偶极振幅超过了99.98%的随机实现，表明星系团旋转的强证据（3.6σ）。黑色虚线显示了对噪声的最佳拟合高斯分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Azimuthally-averaged rkSZ profile derived from our weighted stack of 25 clusters. The red curve shows a theoretical prediction based on a solid-body rotation model and the Battaglia [ Battaglia:2016xbi ] electron number density profile. We find significant evidence for a non-zero amplitude, A rkSZ = 1.05 ± 0.32 A_{rkSZ}=1.05\pm 0.32 . Note that the data points are highly correlated.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：从25个星系团的加权叠加导出的方位角平均rkSZ轮廓。红色曲线显示了基于刚体旋转模型和Battaglia [Battaglia:2016xbi]电子数密度轮廓的理论预测。我们发现非零振幅A_rkSZ=1.05±0.32的显著证据。注意数据点高度相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Masks and main CMB maps used in this work. The top-left panel shows the preprocessing mask used for inpainting the multi-frequency maps prior to component separation. It is constructed from the union of a Galactic plane mask and the Planck LFI and HFI point-source masks. The top right panel shows the analysis mask, defined as the union of the inpainting mask and the Planck polarization confidence mask, and subsequently apodized with a 30-arcminute NaMaster C2 apodization. The red shaded region indicates the subset of the SDSS footprint from which our cluster catalog is drawn. We use the union of this footprint and the analysis mask when performing random stacks when determining the significance of our measurements. The bottom-left shows the full-sky tSZ-deprojected blackbody temperature NILC map constructed from multi-frequency Planck intensity measurements with pyilc . The bottom-right panel shows the E-mode-cleaned tSZ-deprojected blackbody temperature NILC map, T ~ \tilde{T} , which we use for our fiducial analysis. As discussed in the text, the T ~ \tilde{T} map is constructed from maps that have already been masked to ensure numerical stability in the spherical-harmonic transforms.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：本工作中使用的掩模和主要CMB图。左上方面板显示了在成分分离前用于修复多频图的预处理掩模，由银河平面掩模和普朗克LFI和HFI点源掩模的并集构成。右上面板显示了分析掩模，定义为修复掩模和普朗克偏振置信掩模的并集，随后使用30角分的NaMaster C2进行锥化。红色阴影区域表示我们的星系团目录所来自的SDSS覆盖范围的子集。在确定测量显著性时，我们使用该覆盖范围和分析掩模的并集进行随机叠加。左下方面板显示了使用pyilc从多频普朗克强度测量构建的全天tSZ去投影黑体温度NILC图。右下方面板显示了E模清洁的tSZ去投影黑体温度NILC图T̃，我们将其用于基准分析。如文中所述，T̃图是从已掩模的图构建的，以确保球谐变换中的数值稳定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: properties of the 13 cosine needlets used in our NILC maps, showing each filter’s peak multipole, real-space smoothing scale, and excluded Planck channels. Right: harmonic-space needlet filters h ℓ ( I ) h^{(I)}_{\ell} used in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左侧：我们NILC图中使用的13个余弦needlet的性质，显示每个滤波器的峰值多极矩、实空间平滑尺度和排除的普朗克通道。右侧：本工作中使用的谐波空间needlet滤波器h_ℓ^(I)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left: ratio of the power spectrum of the E-mode-subtracted NILC blackbody temperature map, T ~ \tilde{T} , to that of the raw NILC T T map. A cosmic-variance-limited E-mode survey could achieve significantly better variance reduction (black curve). Right: harmonic-space filter applied to remove large- and small-scale modes prior to oriented stacking.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左侧：E模减除后的NILC黑体温度图T̃的功率谱与原始NILC T图功率谱的比值。受宇宙方差限制的E模巡天可以实现显著更好的方差减小（黑色曲线）。右侧：在定向叠加前用于去除大尺度和小尺度模式的谐波空间滤波器。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison of the estimated dipole for different blackbody temperature maps. The top-left panel shows our fiducial analysis with 3.6 ​ σ 3.6\sigma evidence for a dipole. The orange-dashed curve shows the Gaussian fit to the distribution of randoms using the temperature map without E-mode subtraction, which has ∼ 6 % \sim 6\% larger noise than our E-mode subtracted map. The top-middle panel illustrates the impact of the harmonic-space filter (Eq. ( 7 )). Filtering the maps leads to a mild ( 0.2 ​ σ 0.2\sigma ) increase in the significance. The top-right panel illustrates that extending the harmonic-space filter to ℓ max = 3500 \ell_{max}=3500 , as opposed to ℓ max = 3000 \ell_{max}=3000 , has no impact on the results. The bottom panels illustrate the impact of subtracting E-modes. Stacking on a map without E-mode subtraction reduces the significance from 3.6 ​ σ 3.6\sigma to 3.0 ​ σ 3.0\sigma . The improvement due to the E-mode subtraction arises from two effects: (i) the lower noise in the E-mode subtracted maps and (ii) the presence of an insignificant ( 1.4 ​ σ 1.4\sigma ) dipole in the E-mode map that happens to lie in the opposite direction of the expected rkSZ signal, as shown in the bottom-right panel. Finally, the bottom middle panel shows a stack on the SMICA-noSZ map instead of our fiducial pyilc NILC map. The results are consistent with the pyilc analysis, albeit with slightly lower ( 0.2 ​ σ 0.2\sigma ) significance due to the higher noise in Planck PR3 compared to PR4.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：不同黑体温度图下估计偶极的比较。左上方面板显示了我们的基准分析，偶极证据为3.6σ。橙色虚线显示了使用未进行E模减除的温度图的随机分布的高斯拟合，其噪声比我们的E模减除图大约6%。上中方面板说明了谐波空间滤波器（公式(7)）的影响。对图进行滤波导致显著性轻微增加（0.2σ）。右上方面板说明将谐波空间滤波器扩展到ℓ_max=3500（而非ℓ_max=3000）对结果没有影响。下方面板说明了减除E模的影响。在未减除E模的图上叠加将显著性从3.6σ降低到3.0σ。E模减除带来的改进源于两个效应：(i) E模减除图中较低的噪声，以及(ii) E模图中存在一个不显著的（1.4σ）偶极，恰好位于预期rkSZ信号的相反方向，如右下方面板所示。最后，下中方面板显示了在SMICA-noSZ图上的叠加，而不是我们的基准pyilc NILC图。结果与pyilc分析一致，但由于普朗克PR3相比PR4噪声更高，显著性略低（0.2σ）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Impact of the thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich (tSZ) effect on the oriented stack. The first panel shows our fiducial stack, which explicitly deprojects the tSZ contribution to the NILC temperature map. The second panel shows the same analysis applied to a map without tSZ deprojection. While both stacks display a clear dipole, the map without tSZ deprojection contains residual tSZ contributions, which can be seen clearly by taking the difference between the two stacks (third panel). For reference, the final panel shows the oriented stack measured on a NILC Compton- y y (tSZ) map, in which no dipole is seen.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：热Sunyaev-Zel'dovich (tSZ)效应对定向叠加的影响。第一个面板显示了我们的基准叠加，明确去除了NILC温度图中的tSZ贡献。第二个面板显示了在未进行tSZ去投影的图上的相同分析。虽然两个叠加都显示清晰的偶极，但未进行tSZ去投影的图包含残余tSZ贡献，这可以通过两个叠加的差异（第三个面板）清晰看出。作为参考，最后一个面板显示了在NILC Compton-y (tSZ)图上测量的定向叠加，其中未看到偶极。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Impact of dust emission on the oriented stack. The first panel shows our fiducial stack, which includes the Planck 545 GHz channel. The middle panel shows the same analysis applied to a NILC map that does not include the Planck 545 GHz data. Including the 545 GHz channel has a negligible effect on both the stack and the dipole amplitude significance. The right panel shows an oriented stack on the Planck 545 GHz map. We find no evidence of a rotation-aligned dipole in the 545 GHz map. Note that the randoms distribution for the 545 GHz map is non-Gaussian due to the non-Gaussianity of the dust.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：尘埃发射对定向叠加的影响。第一个面板显示了我们的基准叠加，其中包括普朗克545 GHz通道。中间面板显示了在不包括普朗克545 GHz数据的NILC图上的相同分析。包括545 GHz通道对叠加和偶极振幅显著性影响可忽略。右面板显示了在普朗克545 GHz图上的定向叠加。我们在545 GHz图中未发现旋转对齐偶极的证据。注意，由于尘埃的非高斯性，545 GHz图的随机分布是非高斯的。

title: OutLines: Modeling Spectral Lines from Winds, Bubbles, and Outflows
summary: Common methods for studying the kinematics and geometry of outflowing gas rely on modeling emission and absorption lines in integrated spectra using methods that are not physically motivated, including empirical quantiles or fitting multiple Gaussian or Voigt profiles. Such methods are not always consistent with the interpretation of these features and, as a result, miss key underlying physics and can even lead to inaccurate interpretations of observations. To address this problem, we present the publicly available python code OutLines, which provides astrophysical models of spectral emission and absorption line profiles produced by outflows in a variety of environments. The OutLines code accounts for differences in parameterization of the velocity field and density profile while allowing for different outflow geometries, making OutLines versatile and useful for a wide variety of astrophysical phenomena. We demonstrate the wide applicability of OutLines by using the code to model line profiles in an H II region knot, super star clusters, a starburst galaxy, and an AGN. In each of these contexts, we illustrate how OutLines can illuminate key underlying physics in ways that improve our scientific understanding and address important open questions in astronomy, including the key mechanisms in the baryon cycle, the evolution of H II regions and galaxies, and even Lyman continuum escape. OutLines will be a critical resource as massively multiplexed spectroscopic surveys like WEAVE-LOFAR and 4MOST/WAVES come online, providing the means to probe feedback kinematics with deeper, higher resolution spectroscopy for unprecedented large samples of galaxies.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 研究流出气体运动学和几何结构的常用方法依赖于对积分光谱中的发射线和吸收线进行建模，这些方法缺乏物理动机，包括经验分位数或拟合多个高斯或沃伊特轮廓。此类方法并不总是与这些特征的物理解释一致，因此会遗漏关键的底层物理机制，甚至可能导致对观测结果的不准确解释。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了公开可用的Python代码OutLines，该代码提供了由不同环境中的外流产生的光谱发射线和吸收线轮廓的天体物理模型。OutLines代码考虑了速度场和密度分布参数化的差异，同时允许不同的外流几何结构，使其具有多功能性，适用于广泛的天体物理现象。我们通过使用该代码对H II区结、超级星团、星暴星系和活动星系核中的线轮廓进行建模，展示了OutLines的广泛适用性。在每种情况下，我们都说明了OutLines如何以改进我们科学理解的方式阐明关键的底层物理机制，并解决天文学中重要的未解问题，包括重子循环中的关键机制、H II区和星系的演化，甚至莱曼连续谱逃逸。随着WEAVE-LOFAR和4MOST/WAVES等大规模多路光谱巡天的上线，OutLines将成为关键资源，为前所未有的大样本星系提供探测反馈运动学的手段。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，OutLines将成为大规模多路光谱巡天（如WEAVE-LOFAR和4MOST/WAVES）的关键工具，为前所未有的大样本星系提供探测反馈运动学的手段。

title: The Narrow Emission Lines of Seyfert 1 Galaxies: Comparisons with a Large SDSS Sample
summary: We analyzed a large sample of SDSS spectra of Seyfert galaxies, subdividing Seyfert 1s based on their narrow-to-broad Halpha components. Comparing their narrow-lines (NL) to Seyfert2s in line-ratio diagrams, most of the NL of strong Sy 1.0 and Sy 1.2s (with dominant broad lines) are the same as those of pure Sy2s. In contrast, only 25-30 percent of the Sy1.8 and Sy1.9 nuclei (with weak broad lines) are located in the pure Sy2 region, with the rest falling in the composite-star-forming region. We explain these Seyfert-plus-star-formation spectra with a simple model. It shows that 85 percent of NL in Sy1.9 are from HII-regions, while 88 percent of the NL in Sy 1.0 arise from the same NLR as in pure Sy2. About 6 percent of the strong and weak Sy1's have NL dominated by LINER emission, while 15 percent of intermediate Seyferts (Sy 1.5 and Sy 1.6) do. To confirm this Seyfert 1 AGN plus star formation combination, we used stellar absorption-lines to compare their stellar populations. Their Hdelta strengths show that LINERs, pure Sy2s, and also the broad-line dominated Sy1s have old stellar populations. The weak Sy 1s show stronger Hdelta absorption, indicating larger proportions of young stars. About one third of the u band light in Sy1.0 and 1.2 is blended Balmer lines and continuum from the BLR. The NL gas reddening increases as the BLR strength decreases, from Sy1.0 (0.13 mag), to Sy1.9 (0.40 mag), to Sy2s and LINERs both with 0.50 mag. Our data do not support the simplest version of Seyfert 1 and 2 unification, where both AGN classes have identical NL.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了SDSS赛弗特星系光谱，发现不同类型赛弗特1星系窄线发射源差异显著：强宽线赛弗特1.0/1.2的窄线与纯赛弗特2相同，而弱宽线赛弗特1.8/1.9的窄线主要来自HII区，表明存在恒星形成活动。数据不支持赛弗特1和2统一的简单模型。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是检验赛弗特1和赛弗特2星系统一的简单模型，该模型假设两类活动星系核具有相同的窄线区。通过分析不同类型赛弗特星系的光谱特征，探索窄线发射的物理来源差异。
AI.method: 使用SDSS赛弗特星系大样本光谱数据，根据Hα窄线/宽线成分比例细分赛弗特1类型。在线比图中比较不同类型赛弗特的窄线特征，建立简单模型分析窄线来源，并通过恒星吸收线分析恒星种群年龄。
AI.result: 1. 强宽线赛弗特1.0/1.2的窄线与纯赛弗特2相同（88%来自相同NLR）；2. 弱宽线赛弗特1.8/1.9的窄线主要来自HII区（85%）；3. 约6%的赛弗特1窄线由LINER发射主导；4. 窄线气体红化随宽线强度减小而增加；5. 弱赛弗特1星系显示更多年轻恒星。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明赛弗特1和2星系并不遵循简单的统一模型，不同类型赛弗特1的窄线发射源存在显著差异。弱宽线赛弗特1星系中存在显著的恒星形成活动，而强宽线赛弗特1的窄线区与赛弗特2相似。窄线气体红化与宽线强度相关。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们分析了大量SDSS赛弗特星系光谱样本，根据窄/宽Hα成分对赛弗特1星系进行细分。在线比图中将其窄线与赛弗特2星系比较，发现强宽线赛弗特1.0和1.2星系的窄线大多与纯赛弗特2星系相同。相反，只有25-30%的弱宽线赛弗特1.8和1.9星系位于纯赛弗特2区域，其余落在复合恒星形成区。我们用一个简单模型解释这些赛弗特加恒星形成光谱，显示赛弗特1.9中85%的窄线来自HII区，而赛弗特1.0中88%的窄线来自与纯赛弗特2相同的窄线区。约6%的强和弱赛弗特1星系的窄线由LINER发射主导，而15%的中间赛弗特（1.5和1.6）如此。为确认赛弗特1活动星系核加恒星形成的组合，我们使用恒星吸收线比较其星族。Hδ强度显示LINER、纯赛弗特2以及宽线主导的赛弗特1具有老年星族。弱赛弗特1显示更强的Hδ吸收，表明更大比例的年轻恒星。赛弗特1.0和1.2中约三分之一的u波段光来自宽线区的混合巴耳末线和连续谱。窄线气体红化随宽线强度减弱而增加，从赛弗特1.0（0.13星等）到赛弗特1.9（0.40星等），再到赛弗特2和LINER（均为0.50星等）。我们的数据不支持赛弗特1和2统一的最简单版本，即两类活动星系核具有相同的窄线。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：研究结果表明赛弗特1和2星系并不遵循简单的统一模型，不同类型赛弗特1的窄线发射源存在显著差异。弱宽线赛弗特1星系中存在显著的恒星形成活动，而强宽线赛弗特1的窄线区与赛弗特2相似。窄线气体红化与宽线强度相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top Two Rows show three examples of Seyfert 2 galaxies with the full spectra in blue and the fitted continuum in red. In the second row of spectra zoomed in on the H α \alpha /[NII] region, show that the reduction in χ 2 \chi^{2} when adding a fourth Gaussian to the emission line fit is not statistically significant. The bottom two rows show three examples of Seyfert 1 galaxies, with the 3-Gaussian fit shown in red and the (preferred) 4-Gaussian fit in blue. The reduction in χ 2 \chi^{2} is large enough to require the inclusion of broad components in their H α \alpha lines. Based on our quantitative comparison of narrow-to-broad-line H α \alpha components, these are classified as Seyfert 1.0, 1.2, and 1.6.

title: Inflation in light of ACT/SPT: a new perspective from Weyl gravity
summary: Recent measurements from the Atacama Cosmology Telescope (ACT) and the South Pole Telescope (SPT) have placed the strictest constraints on the primordial scalar perturbation spectrum, reporting a spectral index of $n_s\sim0.967-0.98$ at 95% confidence level. This result indicates a stronger scale invariance of the scalar perturbation than earlier estimates, posing challenges for numerous inflation models. In this work, we propose an appealing inflationary scenario from the Weyl scale-invariant gravity theory dominated by the higher-order curvatures. Specifically, the exponential curvature extensions are introduced to suppress the mass divergence of the inflaton. We find such scenario naturally yields leading-order predictions of $n_s\simeq1-3/(2N)\sim0.97-0.975$ or $n_s\simeq1-5/(3N)\sim0.967-0.972$ for various models, in excellent agreement with the ACT/SPT constraints. This result builds a concrete bridge between theoretical and observational scale invariance, implying an enduring cosmic echo of the primordial symmetry.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 来自阿塔卡马宇宙学望远镜（ACT）和南极望远镜（SPT）的最新测量结果对原初标量扰动谱施加了最严格的约束，报告在95%置信水平下谱指数为$n_s\sim0.967-0.98$。这一结果表明标量扰动的尺度不变性比早期估计更强，对众多暴胀模型提出了挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个来自Weyl尺度不变引力理论中由高阶曲率主导的吸引人的暴胀场景。具体而言，引入指数曲率扩展以抑制暴胀子的质量发散。我们发现，对于不同模型，该场景自然产生$n_s\simeq1-3/(2N)\sim0.97-0.975$或$n_s\simeq1-5/(3N)\sim0.967-0.972$的领先阶预测，与ACT/SPT约束高度一致。这一结果在理论与观测尺度不变性之间建立了具体桥梁，暗示着原始对称性在宇宙中留下了持久的回响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该工作建立了理论与观测尺度不变性之间的具体桥梁，表明原始对称性在宇宙中留下了持久的回响。Weyl尺度不变引力理论为解释最新观测数据提供了有吸引力的暴胀场景。
